summary: Session 2 (implement - budget step in, bootstrap path out): D1 and D2 shipped per the S1 locks. D1: new pure-TS writer tools/dabbler-ai-orchestration/src/utils/budgetYaml.ts emits the audited post-migration budget.yaml shape (scope not threshold_scope, warn_at_percent:80 pre-applied, mode derived from the documented bands, explicit verification_nte_usd, set_by getting-started-form) - migrator no-op and editor-BUDGET_SCHEMA-valid, both asserted in tests; the Getting Started form's Build-project-structure step gains the budget / NTE input on Full tier only (OMITTED from the Lightweight DOM, not hidden), with inline validation that blocks Build until valid and the consult-resolved $0 zero-rule radio pair (manual-via-other-engine / skipped, no silent default); the scaffold writes ai_router/budget.yaml at scaffold time, Full only, no-clobber with skip+report into the summary toast; the host boundary FAIL-CLOSES - routeGettingStartedAction rejects a Full build-structure whose untrusted budget rider does not narrow (R1 Major fix), keeping the palette setupNewProject flow the only budgetless entry. D2: copyAdoptionBootstrapPrompt.ts deleted with its registration and package.json command contribution; dead viewsWelcome contribution removed; Marketplace description reworded to name the Getting Started form as the onboarding entry; the whole welcome-HTML pipe removed (host loader/renderer, escHtml/escAttr with compiler-confirmed no surviving caller, protocol welcomeHtml field, client.js fallback branch, .welcome CSS); gettingStarted now REQUIRED on SnapshotPayload (closes the s1-audit sec-1.4 resurrection path); the consumerless dabblerSessionSets.scanState context-key publication retired (ScanState manager and webview scanState protocol messages stay); stale comments touched up across extension.ts, scanState.ts, activationNoFolder.test.ts, the two Playwright specs, and electronLaunch.ts; watcherInventory allowlist line numbers bumped for the import-removal shift. Tests: budgetYaml.test.ts unit matrix (4 mode bands, $0 with each method, narrowing, no-clobber, editor-schema acceptance via validateBatch, migrator-no-op TS twin, scaffold tier gate incl. Lightweight-never-writes), form-render and validation suites, asBudgetChoice narrowing + fail-closed rejection matrix; golden cold-start snapshot untouched and passing. Suites green: TS mocha 908 passing + the 2 tracked pre-existing Set-026 failures; Python 1222 passed/1 skipped; Playwright Layer 3 LOCAL 18 passed re-run on the post-fix code; drift guard OK. Verification: R1 gpt-5-4 ISSUES_FOUND (1 Major Correctness fail-open boundary, 1 Minor Completeness hidden-vs-omitted) -> both fixed in-flight, s2-issues.json persisted with resolutions -> R2 gpt-5-4 VERIFIED (narrow re-verify, no regressions). Routed cost this session $0.3004.

reason.specifics: Per the routed ai-assignment.md recommendation (gemini-pro analysis, Session 1): Session 3 is a docs sweep, UAT-checklist authoring, and mechanical release bumps - structured text generation and precise file edits where Codex CLI is the cheaper, well-suited fit; the D3 lock and the S2 close record carry the full contract, so no Claude-specific context is required.
